issues.evidence: The draft explicitly says the rear sealing is only temporarily effective, unstable, and not a standard repair. The filter-edge material creates short-term stability but does not restore full efficiency.
issues.suggested_fix: In revision and acceptance, keep RV integrity and clean-filter gains limited. Do not record a full repair, full filter recovery, or module unlock.

issues.evidence: The draft brings in roadblocks, external line pulling, and fog-dog pursuit, but stops before the full night assault is resolved.
issues.suggested_fix: Keep chapter 8 as the setup and transition into the car-seizure night. Chapter 9 should handle the full assault and rule test.

issues.evidence: The chapter stays at the outer warehouse and approach road. Old Zheng remains behind the door / speaker pressure, and Qinghe main-building order is not revealed.
issues.suggested_fix: Do not add Qinghe main building interior, full faction structure, or medical station layout in revision.

proposed_state_updates: Old Zheng's broadcast continues to expose the RV location and clean-filter value, drawing human vehicles, shouting, metal strikes, and fog-side pressure toward the outer warehouse.
Qinghe outer-warehouse lights begin shutting down while fog backflows into the approach area; long停留 becomes dangerous under low filter efficiency and rear sealing damage.
Lu Chenzhou establishes the practical repair rule: repair only to the point the RV can move, not to full restoration under exposure.
Lin Zhixia isolates contaminated outer packaging, performs minimum wound stabilization on Zhou Xiaohe, and keeps the temporary observation boundary intact.
The RV uses the gained industrial sealant, clamps, curtain material, and filter-edge material for temporary rear sealing and short-term filter stabilization.

The temporary repair lowers immediate leakage and stabilizes the filter briefly but does not fully repair vehicle integrity, restore clean-filter efficiency to a safe value, or unlock a medical module.
Zhou Xiaohe remains a temporary observation patient, not a formal onboard member or core teammate; she remains able to follow instructions.
External survivors begin active road-blocking and line-pulling behavior, but the full car-seizure assault remains the next chapter's conflict.
Human noise, vehicle lights, and metal strikes attract fog dogs / fog-side fast targets toward the outer warehouse route.
The chapter ends with the RV squeezing out of the outer warehouse approach toward a blocked route, entering the car-seizure night pressure.
human_approval_needed: Approve chapter 8 temporary repair size: useful enough to move, not enough for full RV repair or filter recovery.
Approve early filter-consumption rule: low clean-filter efficiency and rear leakage turn long停留 into a contamination countdown.
Approve chapter 8 as car-seizure night setup, with the full night assault reserved for chapter 9.
Approve that human noise / metal striking can attract fog dogs or fog-side fast targets in this stage.
